purpose: draft path-overlap lock manager (acquire/release/list/isLocked) with TTL + atomic persistence
input-sensitivity: none (no secrets, no PII, no .env values)
redaction: n/a — prompt and response carry only public design facts and TypeScript
decision: review against D07 spec (overlap = same path or prefix dir; expired locks ignored; same-owner re-acquire ok), then adopt with edits to match repo conventions (writeJsonAtomic from ../lib/atomic, node: imports)
